title: CRAFTMORI
description: A Minecraft Mod with Content from OMORI. It has Weapons, Blocks and even Headspace!
body:
# CRAFTMORI - A Minecraft OMORI Mod
![Mod Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c1068a5b64380701f08fc3a8b2d835e070ec9fd.png)

A Mod with Content from OMORI. 
[Go check out the game and Support the Creators on Steam!](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1150690/OMORI/)

**Probably contains OMORI Spoilers!**

## Weapons

![Weapons (Shiny Knife, Nail Bat And Frying Pan)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/082767916e6889b8df24afd0588a47576cd6a006.png)

Shiny Knife:
7.5 ATK
A Knife thats well, shiny.

Nail Bat:
6 ATK
A Baseball Bat with nails in it, perfect for any girlboss!

Frying Pan:
6 ATK
Bash people with a frying pan.

Kel isnt here as of writing this. Sorry.

## Blocks

![All the blocks that are (as of 0.1.3a Hotfix 1) in the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a66c7b20f7aaa031a2f3488473eab6f0223bdd.png)

We have Vast Forest Variants for Stairs, Slabs and Fences!

![Whitespace Door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a651e0692e4cb573fc7ede38b3af74e1550e0cdc.png)

White Space Door brings you to The Overworld, Headspace and etc.

![Watermelon Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e40f20754959249bf6e229a2d0019f36495a5d36.png)

The Watermelon block when broken, gives loot from Food to even Diamonds! (Rarely)

## Dimensions

There are 3 Dimensions that planned for this mod,

<details>
<summary>
Spoilers
</summary>
Headspace
Black Space
Faraway Town
</details>


## Biomes

Vast Forest

![Headspace - Vast Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eea326dcdea10bd237b4ccbfca0adec6994725d9.png)

Pyrefly Forest

![Headspace - Pyrefly Forest (Note that the version of this screenshot is based on an older version)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53f1774742feb24e56be6f670725845384367bcd.png)
